generation: direct HTTP /v1/chat/completions, response_format json_schema (grammar-constrained enums), sub-reviews + neutral merge
sampling: Qwen3 instruct (non-thinking): temperature 0.7, top_p 0.8, top_k 20, presence_penalty 1.5; grammar decoding suppresses <think>
context_arm_grounding: reporting-guideline checklist (identical manifest to trial 01) — only the model differs
judge: Claude (blinded, arm-stripped, hash-ordered) — held constant with trial 01 for a clean weak-vs-strong comparison
purpose: Weak base model: test whether fabrication appears (it could not on Claude — ceiling), and whether persona/ensemble/context effects differ from the strong-model pilot.
